creator: dima@Chg.RU
text:
This patch is an update to the most recent version.
Please do not change MASTER_SITES. ftp.gpad.ac.ru is under my control.
Calamaris.Cord.de is the original site. Those two you added last time are
unreliable and are both listed in fenner's portsurvey as bad.
(These are notes to billf).


diff -Nur calamaris.old/Makefile calamaris/Makefile
--- calamaris.old/Makefile	Mon Feb 22 11:29:32 1999
+++ calamaris/Makefile	Mon Feb 22 11:31:11 1999
@@ -6,11 +6,10 @@
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.2 1999/01/26 22:39:20 billf Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	calamaris-2.16
+DISTNAME=	calamaris-2.22
 CATEGORIES=	www textproc
-MASTER_SITES=	http://calamaris.cord.de/ \
-		ftp://ftp.bse.bg/pub/Unix/proxy/ \
-		ftp://ftp.sai.msu.su/pub/unix/WWW/cache/squid/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://Calamaris.Cord.de/ \
+		ftp://ftp.gpad.ac.ru/pub/FreeBSD/distfiles/
 
 MAINTAINER=	dima@Chg.RU
 
diff -Nur calamaris.old/files/md5 calamaris/files/md5
--- calamaris.old/files/md5	Mon Feb 22 11:29:32 1999
+++ calamaris/files/md5	Mon Feb 22 11:34:34 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (calamaris-2.16.tar.gz) = e667b530ac8547dc926e5372dfa93dfa
+MD5 (calamaris-2.22.tar.gz) = ffbaa391c17d05469494d6db1473f922
